title: Which Joker Are You? Your Answers Will Reveal Your Inner Clown Prince
dek: Eight actors, eight completely different flavors of chaos — take this quiz to find out which Clown Prince of Crime is secretly running your personality.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here — just pick the option that sounds most like something you'd actually say, and let the clown makeup do the rest.

questions.question: Your friend cancels plans last minute. Your honest reaction?

answers.text: I laugh way harder than the situation deserves and immediately forget about it.
I get theatrically, dramatically offended — this is a personal betrayal.
I go quiet. It confirms everything I already believed about people.
I spiral a little, then do something unpredictable to cope.
A dance that turns into a full performance nobody asked for.
A magic trick involving a sharp object and zero warning.
Something so unhinged everyone just quietly backs away.
An impression that makes everyone uncomfortably sad, then somehow funny.

questions.question: What's your villain origin story, realistically?

answers.text: Honestly? Doesn't matter. Some men just want to watch it burn.
Chaotic, loud, and impossible to pin down — on purpose.
A slow, sad unraveling nobody noticed until it was too late.
A tragic backstory I'll bring up mid-fight for sympathy points.

questions.question: How do you handle an argument?

answers.text: It escalates fast and gets weird in a way people talk about later.
I get uncomfortably raw and emotional about it.
I smirk through the whole thing like it's a game.
I laugh at the worst possible moment.

questions.question: Pick a color palette for your life.

answers.text: Faded red suit, washed-out everything else.
Bleached hair, scars, and a grin that doesn't fully close.
Purple, green, and a laugh that's basically its own color.
Muted grays with one unsettling pop of red.
Causing a little trouble, then disappearing before anyone can pin it on me.
Cackling at my own plan going perfectly wrong.
Sitting in total silence until someone finally asks what I'm thinking.
Hijacking a TV broadcast just to mess with people, then laughing about it for hours.

questions.question: How would your coworkers describe you behind your back?

answers.text: The laugh alone should've been a warning sign.
Quiet. Too quiet. We're a little scared of him.
Charming, a little much, secretly having the time of his life.
Loud, unpredictable, definitely the main character of every meeting.
Nothing visible. That's what makes it scarier.
A joy buzzer and a bad pun, honestly that's enough.
Acid-spray flower on my lapel, obviously.
Whatever's on the table. A pencil will do just fine.

questions.question: What's your relationship with Batman, really?

answers.text: A fun rivalry, honestly — we're basically in on the same bit.
I made him. He owes me his whole personality.
We're not so different, and that's the whole point.
It's complicated, loud, and involves way too many stunts.
Total chaos, delivered with maximum flair.
Prove that everything anyone believes in can be knocked down in one bad day.
Build an empire out of pure chaos and vibes.
Just be seen. That's it. That's the whole tragedy.

results.name: Cesar Romero
results.subtitle: Batman (1966 TV series & film)
results.description: You're pure, unfiltered camp — all giggles, garish purple suits, and gleeful scenery-chewing with zero interest in tragic backstories. You refuse to take anything too seriously, mustache and all, and honestly, life's more fun that way.

results.name: Jack Nicholson
results.subtitle: Batman (1989)
results.description: You're big, theatrical, and impossible to ignore — every room becomes your stage the second you walk in. You bring chaos with style, art with a body count, and you never let anyone forget who's really in charge.

results.name: Heath Ledger
results.subtitle: The Dark Knight (2008)
results.description: You're the quiet menace in the room — calm right up until you absolutely aren't. You don't need a plan, just a little chaos and the patience to watch it unfold.

results.name: Jared Leto
results.subtitle: Suicide Squad (2016)
results.description: You're loud, flashy, and a little unhinged in ways people are still talking about years later. Method to the max, chaos as a lifestyle — you commit fully, even when nobody asked you to.

results.name: Joaquin Phoenix
results.subtitle: Joker (2019)
results.description: You feel everything way too deeply, and it shows in every twitchy, uncomfortable, achingly human moment. Your chaos isn't about a master plan — it's about finally being seen, even if it takes a full unraveling to get there.

results.name: Cameron Monaghan
results.subtitle: Gotham (TV series)
results.description: You're a slow-burn transformation — charming and a little tragic before you fully tip over into chaos. You keep people guessing exactly how far you're willing to go, and honestly, so do you.

results.name: Mark Hamill
results.subtitle: Batman: The Animated Series
results.description: Your laugh really is your whole personality — zany one second, genuinely bloodcurdling the next. You've mastered the art of making people laugh and flinch in the exact same breath.

results.name: Barry Keoghan
results.subtitle: The Batman (2022)
results.description: You're quiet, unsettling, and impossible to fully read — a single scene from you does more damage than most people's whole villain arc. You don't need noise to be terrifying; the silence does all the work.

sources.title: The best Joker is still Cesar Romero in the '66 Batman TV show, hands down
The Inspiration Behind Mark Hamill's Signature Joker Voice - SlashFilm
Mark Hamill Made A Language Out Of The Joker's Laughs For Batman: The Animated Series - SlashFilm
Mark Hamill Reveals How to Do His Iconic Joker Laugh - CBR
